mapper.select: SELECT sd.date, sd.user_id, sd.user_name, sd.open_hope, sd.role, sd.confirmed, sd.remarks, u.account_type FROM sf_selected_date sd LEFT JOIN sf_users u ON sd.user_id = u.userid WHERE sd.date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} ORDER BY sd.date, sd.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sf_selected_date (date, user_id, user_name, open_hope, role, confirmed, remarks) VALUES (#{date}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{openHope}, #{role}, COALESCE(#{confirmed}, 'N'), #{remarks}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_name = VALUES(user_name), open_hope = VALUES(open_hope), role = VALUES(role), remarks = VALUES(remarks), confirmed = VALUES(confirmed)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sf_selected_date WHERE date = #{date} AND user_id = #{userId}
